description: Implement a granular consent mechanism that allows users to opt out of specific data tracking categories, ensuring compliance with GDPR.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their privacy settings WHEN they choose to opt out THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

description: Establish a data retention policy that complies with GDPR, detailing how long user data will be stored and the process for data deletion.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the policy is established WHEN user data is collected THEN it should be retained according to the defined policy.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak and store raw events with full user identifiers for profile enrichment downstream.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN their behavior metrics are captured and stored in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions. The model should incorporate collaborative filtering and content-based approaches, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine is deployed THEN it should improve content CTR by at least 20% within 60 days.

description: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit to address concerns regarding lawful processing of behavioral data, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled WHEN the audit is conducted THEN all GDPR compliance issues must be identified and documented.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays the behavioral data collected about them, including inferred interests and engagement patterns. Include toggles to opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they should see their inferred interests and have the option to opt out of tracking.

description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices WHEN they perform actions THEN their activity should be linked to a single user profile.

description: Implement tracking for user engagement metrics, including session duration and content consumption, to inform product improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user engagement metrics are implemented WHEN users interact with the platform THEN their engagement should be tracked accurately.

description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring that individual re-identification is not possible.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the API is implemented WHEN advertisers request user segments THEN only anonymized data should be provided.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on the personalization features to continuously improve the recommendation engine.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is live WHEN users interact with the personalization features THEN they should be able to submit feedback easily.

story_title: Set up monitoring and alerting for data pipeline
description: Set up monitoring and alerting for the user behavior tracking pipeline to ensure data integrity and performance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN data anomalies occur THEN alerts should be triggered to the engineering team.
